titleStmt.title: SII 29.132: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 132. (A.R. No. B. 625 of 1961-62.) KOḌĒRI [hamlet of] KIRIMANJĒŚVARA, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab setup in front of Hakre-maṭha.

It states that when mahāpradhāna Maleya-daṁṇāyaka was governing the Bārakūru-rajya, Vissaṇṇa, son of Vīraṇṇa made a grant of land called Āneya-bāḷu after purchasing it by paying the prevailing rates, to the god Kiru-manḍilēśvara for feeding 14 brahmanas and burning a perpetual lamp in the temple. The record gives details of boundaries of lands and also details of daily expenditure. It is said that the grant was made on the day of solar eclipse [the previous day after record]. Also the record speaks of a grant made for burning a perpetual lamp (in front of) Kōṭīśvaradēva.

Also the record says that Vissaṇṇa got renovated the Hosakēṟi maṭha at Bayidūru which had been heavily damaged by the floods and made some grants to it. Earlier Kōṭi-seṭṭi of Mangalūru had made some grants to this maṭha. Since the record is very much damaged details of grants are lost.
It is dated Śaka 1280, Viḷambi, Śrāvaṇa, śu. 1, Vaḍḍavāra. It corresponds with 1358 A.D., July 7, Saturday, f.d.t. 01.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . śrī sarasvatyeyēṁ namaḥ .
namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdra cāmara cārave
trailōkya nagarāraṁba mūlastaṁbāya śaṁbavē [. sva*]
sti śrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruśa 1280 neya viḷaṁ
bi saṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa śu 1 vaḍavāradaṁdu śrīma
nu mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ Arirāya vibhāḍa bhāṣegeta
ppuvarāyara gaṁḍa śrīvīra bukkaṁṇa voḍeyara ni
yāmadiṁ śrīmanumahāpradhānaṁ maleya daṁ
ṇāyakaru bārakūra rājyavanāḷuvalli nāgū
ra grāma doḷaguḷḷa (naṁda) Eriya ka(ṭṭe)ya bāḷanū Ā
bāḷina mūligaḷa keyyali tatkālōcita krayadra
byava koṭṭu mūlavanu Ā vīraṁṇaṁgaḷa makkaḷu vissa
ṁṇaṁgaḷu dāreyaneṟasikoṁḍu kiṟu maṁḍi
lēśvara dēvaralli māḍi barasida śilā śāsanada
kramaveṁteṁdaḍe Āneya bāḷina catussīme mū
ḍaṇa gaḍi hoḷeyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkaṇagaḍi saṁ
ni viṣṇu Āne saṁteya hebāruva dāmōdara hebāra
yiyyakki bayala nāḍaṇakuṁni birāva yiṁ
Āru prajeya gaḍiyiṁ baḍagalu paḍu
valu beṭṭinali voṇabayala bhīmayya viṣṇu
va gaḍiyiṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu hoḷeyiṁ
da teṁkalu yiṁtti catussīmege nāgūrali ma(taṁ)ja
dalū voppi yi gaḍiya kaṭṭiṁda voḷa guḷa ba
yalu tōṭa makki mara nokki nidilu Allivuḷaṁ
thā samasta svāṁmyavanū kiṟu maṁḍalēśvara
dēvarali Ā vissaṁṇaṁgaḷu sūriya grahaṇadali
dāna dhārāpūrbakaṁ māḍida dharmma Ā dēvālya
dali Uṁba brāṁhmaru pratidina 1 kkaṁ Uṁba
brāhmaru jana 12 Ā(a)ḍigeya māḍuva jana 1 E
kādaśiya Uḷapaḍiya koṁḍu Aḍigeya mā
ḍuva jana1 Antū brāhmara jana 14 kkaṁ A
kki hāne 12 mēluvecca haṇa 1 ṟalekkadali va
ruśa 1 kaṁ Akki hāne (30) ṟatikka mūḍe 1kkaṁ
19 hoṁnu ga 45 haṇa 6 hoṟe kūli Akki
mūḍe 2 hāne 20 kiṟukuḷa veccakke ga 1 ha

ṇa 2 Akki mūḍe ga hāne 12
Ā kiṟumaṁdilēśvara dēvarige naṁ
dā veḷaku 1 kkama gā3 kōṭēśvara dēva
rige naṁdā veḷaku 1kkaṁ ga(4) hoṁnu maṁgalūra
kōṭiseṭṭi bayidūra hosakēṟiya maṭhada
lli māḍida dharmmakke yi kēri ya bāḷinali (naḍḍūra)
li voḷaguḷḷa gadde hoḷe kaḷi yāgi hō
dalli vissaṁṇaṁgaḷu jīrnōddhārava māḍi Ā
hosa kēṟiya marada chatrakke
1 hāne mūḍe lekkadali
10 kkaṁ Akke mūḍe 40 Aṁntu yikṣētradali
ra lekkadali mūḍe 22
naṁdā veḷakiṁge ga 52 Ayivatte
raḍu hoṁnanū naḍasuvaṁtāgi vissaṁṇagaḷa
kayyali nāyaru mūlavāgi koṁḍa mū
lu padmanābhana mādhavaṁge siṁnegēriya
siṁnegēryya bayala viṣṇuviṁge
gōpināthana kēśavaṁge siṁnegēri sthaḷa kariya gōppaṇa
na kēśavaṁge siṁneya kēryya kēśavaṁge siṁnegēryya
bayala vāsudēvaṁge
māgi kēriya gauḍana nāraṇaṁge
Appaṁṇa sēna bōvaṁge
-damaged-
Ā Ūralu saluva hāne saluva A
ḷateya mūḍe 10 hāne Antu
dalu naḍeva nāyaru mūlavāgi baḍa
vāgi baredu koṭṭa śilāśā
sanakke maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 29.132 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
